hero.headlineBefore: Custom websites for Toronto small businesses — built with
hero.subtitle: Nice Guy Web Design builds fast, modern websites for Toronto small businesses — designed to improve visibility, generate leads, and stay easy to maintain as your business grows.

heroImage.alt: Abstract tech visualization — modern web development

servicesTeaser.title: Core capabilities
servicesTeaser.subtitle: Engineered for performance, designed for people who run real businesses.

pricingTeaser.title: Website pricing
pricingTeaser.subtitle: Starter Website from $500 one-time, Hosting & Reports at $20/mo, or Growth & Optimization at $200/mo — designed to improve lead generation and engagement over time.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about starting your project.

items.question: Do you work with Toronto small businesses?
items.answer: Yes. Nice Guy Web Design specializes in websites for Toronto and GTA small businesses, contractors, creators, and service-based businesses.

items.question: Do you offer SEO optimization?
items.answer: Yes. SEO optimization, Google Search Console reporting, and conversion-focused improvements are available through ongoing monthly plans.

items.question: Can I start with just a website?
items.answer: Yes. Businesses can start with a one-time website project and later upgrade to hosting, reporting, or SEO optimization services.

items.question: Do you only work locally?
items.answer: Most clients are based in Toronto and the GTA, though remote projects across Canada are also available.

items.question: What types of businesses do you work with?
items.answer: Nice Guy Web Design works with local businesses, contractors, cafés, nonprofits, creators, and service-based businesses looking for modern, easy-to-maintain websites.

contactTeaser.headline: Need a website that works harder for your business?
contactTeaser.body: Get in touch with Nice Guy Web Design to discuss a custom website, SEO improvements, or growth-focused updates for your Toronto business.
contactTeaser.responseNote: I usually reply within one business day
